app_info.subtitle: Analyze rental deals
app_info.description: Deal Analyzer helps users underwrite U.S. rental properties, estimate missing rent and expense inputs, parse Zillow or Redfin listings, compare multiple deals, and optionally save deals to a signed-in account for later review inside ChatGPT.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only calculates underwriting metrics from the provided inputs and returns the result without saving or changing records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not fetch or update external systems and operates only on the arguments passed to the tool.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, or otherwise perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only extracts structured listing fields from pasted text or a listing page and returns them without modifying stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Fetches public listing pages when a URL is provided, so it reads from external websites outside the app's private system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions in the app or on external services.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only parses listing data and runs underwriting calculations before returning the result without saving records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Fetches public listing pages when a URL is provided, so it reads from external websites before analyzing the property.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or carry out irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only compares the provided deal inputs and returns ranked analyses without changing any stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not contact external services and only computes a comparison from the supplied arguments.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, send, or otherwise perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Writes a saved deal record and computed analysis to the signed-in user's private account.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only writes to the app's private database and does not publish to public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Can overwrite an existing saved deal when the same listing URL or address and price already exist for that user.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only reads saved deals for the signed-in user and returns them without modifying records.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads from the app's private database and does not access public internet state or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Analyze a rental property with explicit rent and annual expenses.
test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze a rental property with price 250000, rent 2200, taxes 2400 per year, insurance 1200 per year, HOA 0, city Phoenix, state AZ.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a scored underwriting result with a BUY, HOLD, or PASS recommendation, monthly cash flow, and break-even rent.

test_cases.description: Analyze a deal when the user only knows the purchase price and location.
test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze a rental deal for a $310,000 single-family home in Tampa, FL. I only know the price and location.
test_cases.expected_output: Estimates missing rent, tax, and insurance inputs and returns a scored underwriting result with estimated-input flags.

test_cases.description: Parse a pasted listing description into structured listing fields.
test_cases.user_prompt: Parse this listing text: 123 Main St, Columbus, OH 43215. Price: $189,900. Estimated rent: $1,650/month. Taxes: $2,200/year. HOA: $150/month. 2 bed, 1 bath condo.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns structured fields such as address, price, rent, taxes, HOA, beds, baths, and property type extracted from the text.

test_cases.description: Parse and analyze a pasted listing in one step.
test_cases.user_prompt: Analyze this listing: 456 Oak Ave, Indianapolis, IN 46203. Price $210,000. Rent $1,850/month. Taxes $2,400/year. Insurance $1,100/year. 3 bed 2 bath single-family home.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the parsed listing details together with a scored underwriting result and recommendation.

test_cases.description: Compare two rental deals side by side.
test_cases.user_prompt: Compare these two rental deals: Deal A price 220000 rent 1900 taxes 2400 insurance 1000 in Cleveland OH; Deal B price 275000 rent 2400 taxes 3100 insurance 1200 in Kansas City MO.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns both deals ranked by score and cash flow so the user can see which opportunity looks stronger.

test_cases.description: Attempt to save a deal from ChatGPT.
test_cases.user_prompt: Save this deal for me: price 250000, rent 2200, taxes 2400, insurance 1200, address 123 Main St, Phoenix AZ.
test_cases.expected_output: If the app is connected, saves or updates the user's private deal record; otherwise returns an authentication-required message.

test_cases.description: Load saved deals for the current user.
test_cases.expected_output: If the app is connected, returns the user's saved deals; otherwise returns a reconnect or authentication message.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated travel booking requests.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Book me a hotel in Miami for next weekend.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because travel booking is outside its supported real estate analysis workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for deleting saved deals because no MCP delete tool is exposed.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Delete all of my saved deals.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the MCP server does not expose a delete-deal tool.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated personal productivity questions.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What meetings do I have tomorrow?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is outside rental analysis, listing parsing, and saved-deal workflows.
